meta.title: AI football predictions today - all leagues | BetsPlug
meta.description: Daily AI football predictions for 30+ leagues. Free picks today, locked before kickoff. Public track record.

hero.subheadline: Daily predictions across 30+ leagues, generated by our AI engine using Elo, Poisson and machine learning. Locked before kickoff.

weekTab.body: Subscribers see every prediction across the next 7 days. Free users see today only.

paywall.body: Subscribers see every prediction across 30+ leagues, full match analysis, and get them 24 hours before kickoff.
bullets: Full match analysis: xG, H2H, lineups, reasoning

body: Every prediction on this page is generated by our AI engine, not by editors or tipsters. The engine combines Elo ratings (team strength), Poisson models (goal probability) and machine learning (pattern recognition) to evaluate each match across 40+ variables.
Predictions are locked with a public timestamp before kickoff. We publish wins and losses both — verifiable in our public track record.

questions.a: Predictions are generated continuously. The hub page refreshes data every minute. Once a prediction is locked, it cannot be modified.

questions.q: Why only 5 free predictions per day?
questions.a: Free predictions are a sample of our daily output. Subscribers receive all daily predictions across 30+ leagues, plus full match analysis.

questions.q: Can I get predictions for a specific match I'm interested in?
questions.a: Subscribers can browse all predictions for any league or match. Free users see a curated selection from top leagues.
Confidence reflects our model's certainty about the predicted outcome. A 78% confidence on 'Over 2.5 Goals' means the model estimates a 78% probability of that outcome.

questions.q: Why are predictions locked before kickoff?
questions.a: Locking predictions with a public timestamp ensures we cannot edit them retroactively. This is the core of our transparency guarantee.

questions.q: Do free predictions have lower accuracy than paid?
questions.a: No. Free predictions use the same engine and methodology as paid predictions. The difference is volume, depth, timing, and league coverage.

finalCta.body: 5 free per day. Unlimited with any paid plan.
